requirement_topic.en: Refrigerant — R-600a Flammable Refrigerant Handling and Charge (BDS IEC 60335-2-24, Montreal/Kigali)
requirement_topic.zh: 制冷剂——R-600a可燃制冷剂处理与充注量（BDS IEC 60335-2-24，蒙特利尔/基加利）
requirement_topic.zht: 製冷劑——R-600a可燃製冷劑處理與充注量（BDS IEC 60335-2-24，蒙特婁/基加利）

summary.en: Bangladesh does not operate an EU-style F-Gas Regulation with quota-based HFC phase-down or product prohibition annexes. Refrigerant control for household refrigerators is addressed two ways: (1) Safety — flammable-refrigerant charge limits, ventilation, and ignition-source requirements are governed by the safety standard BDS IEC 60335-2-24 (and its Annex equivalent to IEC 60335-2-24 Annex AA) as part of the BSTI Certification Mark assessment; R-600a (isobutane, GWP approximately 3, ISO 817 class A3 lower flammability) is the dominant household refrigerant and is accepted provided charge limits and documentation are met. (2) Ozone/climate — Bangladesh is a party to the Montreal Protocol and has ratified the Kigali Amendment; its HFC phase-down and any HCFC/HFC import controls are administered nationally (Ozone Cell, Department of Environment) rather than through a product-marketing prohibition list. For an R-600a refrigerator, the practical obligation is to declare the refrigerant designation and charge weight (grams) and to confirm the charge is within IEC 60335-2-24 flammable-refrigerant limits.
summary.zh: 孟加拉国没有像欧盟那样基于配额削减HFC并附产品禁令附件的氟气体法规。家用电冰箱的制冷剂管控通过两个途径处理：（1）安全——可燃制冷剂充注量限制、通风及点火源要求，作为BSTI认证标志评定的一部分，由安全标准BDS IEC 60335-2-24（及其等同于IEC 60335-2-24附件AA的附件）管控；R-600a（异丁烷，GWP约3，ISO 817 A3类低可燃性）为主流家用制冷剂，在满足充注量限制和文件要求的前提下被接受。（2）臭氧/气候——孟加拉国是《蒙特利尔议定书》缔约方并已批准《基加利修正案》；其HFC削减及任何HCFC/HFC进口管控由国家层面（臭氧办公室、环境部）管理，而非通过产品销售禁令清单。对于R-600a电冰箱，实际义务是声明制冷剂名称及充注量（克），并确认充注量在IEC 60335-2-24可燃制冷剂限值之内。
summary.zht: 孟加拉沒有像歐盟那樣基於配額削減HFC並附產品禁令附件的氟氣體法規。家用電冰箱的製冷劑管控通過兩個途徑處理：（1）安全——可燃製冷劑充注量限制、通風及點火源要求，作為BSTI認證標誌評定的一部分，由安全標準BDS IEC 60335-2-24（及其等同於IEC 60335-2-24附件AA的附件）管控；R-600a（異丁烷，GWP約3，ISO 817 A3類低可燃性）為主流家用製冷劑，在滿足充注量限制和文件要求的前提下被接受。（2）臭氧/氣候——孟加拉是《蒙特婁議定書》締約方並已批准《基加利修正案》；其HFC削減及任何HCFC/HFC進口管控由國家層面（臭氧辦公室、環境部）管理，而非通過產品銷售禁令清單。對於R-600a電冰箱，實際義務是聲明製冷劑名稱及充注量（克），並確認充注量在IEC 60335-2-24可燃製冷劑限值之內。

standards_or_laws: BDS IEC 60335-2-24 — flammable-refrigerant (R-600a) charge limits, ventilation and ignition-source requirements within the BSTI safety assessment (Bangladesh adoption of IEC 60335-2-24, equivalent to its Annex AA)
ISO 817 — Refrigerants — Designation and safety classification (R-600a classified A3: lower flammability)
Montreal Protocol and Kigali Amendment — Bangladesh HFC phase-down administered nationally by the Ozone Cell, Department of Environment (no EU-style product prohibition annex)

summary.en: China addresses flammable-refrigerant charge limits for household appliances within GB 4706.13-2014 (incorporating R-600a provisions derived from IEC 60335-2-24), with GB 9237 for refrigerating-system safety (aligned with ISO 5149). China has no EU-style F-Gas quota regulation for refrigeration products; it runs its HFC phase-down under the Kigali Amendment (ratified June 2021), administered by the Ministry of Ecology and Environment (MEE). Chinese household refrigerators have overwhelmingly transitioned to R-600a, so for the refrigerant aspect Chinese export units are generally well-positioned for Bangladesh — both regimes accept R-600a and both anchor flammable-charge limits in the same IEC 60335-2-24 base.
summary.zh: 中国在GB 4706.13-2014中处理家用器具的可燃制冷剂充注量限制（纳入源自IEC 60335-2-24的R-600a规定），并以GB 9237规范制冷系统安全（参照ISO 5149）。中国没有针对制冷产品的欧盟式氟气体配额法规；其HFC削减依据《基加利修正案》（2021年6月批准）执行，由生态环境部（MEE）管理。中国家用电冰箱已大量转向R-600a，故就制冷剂方面而言，中国出口产品对孟加拉国一般具备良好条件——两套制度均接受R-600a，且均将可燃充注量限值锚定于同一IEC 60335-2-24基础。
summary.zht: 中國在GB 4706.13-2014中處理家用器具的可燃製冷劑充注量限制（納入源自IEC 60335-2-24的R-600a規定），並以GB 9237規範製冷系統安全（參照ISO 5149）。中國沒有針對製冷產品的歐盟式氟氣體配額法規；其HFC削減依據《基加利修正案》（2021年6月批准）執行，由生態環境部（MEE）管理。中國家用電冰箱已大量轉向R-600a，故就製冷劑方面而言，中國出口產品對孟加拉一般具備良好條件——兩套制度均接受R-600a，且均將可燃充注量限值錨定於同一IEC 60335-2-24基礎。

standards_or_laws: GB 4706.13-2014 — flammable-refrigerant (R-600a) charge provisions for household refrigerating appliances (derived from IEC 60335-2-24)
GB 9237 — Safety requirements for refrigerating systems and heat pumps (aligned with ISO 5149)
Kigali Amendment to the Montreal Protocol — China HFC phase-down (ratified June 2021, administered by MEE)

gap.en: The refrigerant gap is small because both China and Bangladesh anchor flammable-charge limits in IEC 60335-2-24 and both accept R-600a; there is no EU-style F-Gas prohibition list in Bangladesh to manage. The remaining points are documentary and procedural: (1) the BSTI safety submission must confirm the R-600a charge is within the IEC 60335-2-24 limits for the specific appliance configuration, and product documentation must state the refrigerant designation (R-600a / isobutane) and charge weight in grams; (2) Chinese CCC charge data should be re-confirmed against the BSTI test sample configuration; (3) for any model still using an HFC (e.g., R-134a), there is no Bangladesh product-prohibition annex, but national HFC/HCFC import controls under the Ozone Cell should be checked. Bangladesh has no separate refrigerant-handling technician-certification gate equivalent to the EU F-Gas certificate at the household-appliance charge level.
gap.zh: 制冷剂差距较小，因为中国与孟加拉国均将可燃充注量限值锚定于IEC 60335-2-24且均接受R-600a；孟加拉国不存在欧盟式氟气体禁令清单需要应对。其余为文件和程序性事项：（1）BSTI安全提交须确认R-600a充注量在该器具具体配置下符合IEC 60335-2-24限值，且产品文件须注明制冷剂名称（R-600a/异丁烷）及充注量（克）；（2）中国CCC充注量数据应针对BSTI检测样品配置重新确认；（3）对任何仍使用HFC（如R-134a）的型号，孟加拉国虽无产品禁令附件，但应核查臭氧办公室项下的国家HFC/HCFC进口管控。在家用器具充注量层面，孟加拉国不设等同于欧盟氟气体证书的独立制冷剂处理技师认证门槛。
gap.zht: 製冷劑差距較小，因為中國與孟加拉均將可燃充注量限值錨定於IEC 60335-2-24且均接受R-600a；孟加拉不存在歐盟式氟氣體禁令清單需要應對。其餘為文件和程序性事項：（1）BSTI安全提交須確認R-600a充注量在該器具具體配置下符合IEC 60335-2-24限值，且產品文件須注明製冷劑名稱（R-600a/異丁烷）及充注量（克）；（2）中國CCC充注量數據應針對BSTI檢測樣品配置重新確認；（3）對任何仍使用HFC（如R-134a）的型號，孟加拉雖無產品禁令附件，但應核查臭氧辦公室項下的國家HFC/HCFC進口管控。在家用器具充注量層面，孟加拉不設等同於歐盟氟氣體證書的獨立製冷劑處理技師認證門檻。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory at appliance level via BDS IEC 60335-2-24 (R-600a charge limits) within the BSTI Certification Mark assessment; HFC phase-down under Kigali administered nationally by the Ozone Cell / Department of Environment — no EU-style product prohibition list
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory at appliance level via GB 4706.13-2014 (R-600a charge limits); China HFC phase-down under Kigali Amendment administered by MEE

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] R-600a is accepted in Bangladesh and is not subject to any EU-style F-Gas product prohibition. Both China and Bangladesh anchor flammable-charge limits in IEC 60335-2-24, so the refrigerant gap is mainly documentary: confirm R-600a charge against IEC 60335-2-24 limits in the BSTI sample configuration and declare refrigerant type and charge weight. National HFC/HCFC import controls under the Ozone Cell apply at a country, not product-marketing, level.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] R-600a在孟加拉国被接受，不受任何欧盟式氟气体产品禁令约束。中国与孟加拉国均将可燃充注量限值锚定于IEC 60335-2-24，故制冷剂差距主要为文件性：在BSTI样品配置下确认R-600a充注量符合IEC 60335-2-24限值，并声明制冷剂类型及充注量。臭氧办公室项下的国家HFC/HCFC进口管控适用于国家层面而非产品销售层面。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] R-600a在孟加拉被接受，不受任何歐盟式氟氣體產品禁令約束。中國與孟加拉均將可燃充注量限值錨定於IEC 60335-2-24，故製冷劑差距主要為文件性：在BSTI樣品配置下確認R-600a充注量符合IEC 60335-2-24限值，並聲明製冷劑類型及充注量。臭氧辦公室項下的國家HFC/HCFC進口管控適用於國家層面而非產品銷售層面。
